metadata.description: The trusted B2B marketplace for hospitals to exchange surplus and needed medicines.

home.badge: Trusted B2B medicine exchange for hospitals
home.heroDescription: MedMarket connects verified hospitals to buy, sell, and exchange expensive medicines before they expire — reducing waste and cutting procurement costs.
home.feature1Desc: Every hospital on the platform is manually verified. Only licensed healthcare providers can list or purchase.
home.feature2Desc: Direct B2B transactions. No middlemen. Prices are set by the selling hospital and are fully negotiable.
home.feature3Desc: Medicines nearing expiry are surfaced first. Sell surplus stock before it expires and recover costs.
home.feature4Desc: Listings update in real-time. Set up alerts for specific medicines and be notified when they become available.
home.feature5Desc: Search by ATC code, generic name, expiry date, city, or therapeutic category.
home.feature6Desc: List in minutes, order with one click, confirm delivery. Full audit trail for compliance.
home.ctaDescription: Register your hospital today — verification takes 1–2 business days.

listings.available: {count, plural, one {# listing available} other {# listings available}}

listings.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your search or clearing filters.

dashboard.activityOverview: Here's an overview of your activity.

newListing.descriptionPlaceholder: Any additional notes, documentation available, etc.
newListing.scannerHint: Point the camera at the DataMatrix or EAN barcode on the packaging
newListing.scannerCameraError: Camera unavailable. Please check browser permissions.
newListing.scanFilled: Barcode scanned — batch number and expiry date filled automatically. Medicine name and ATC code must be entered manually.
newListing.disclaimerBody: By publishing this listing, you confirm that the medicine has been stored in full compliance with the required conditions (temperature, humidity, light exposure, and any other applicable requirements), and that shipping will be arranged in a manner that preserves those conditions throughout delivery. MedMarket acts solely as a marketplace and accepts no liability for the quality, storage, or transportation of medicines listed on the platform. Full legal and regulatory responsibility remains with the listing institution.
newListing.disclaimerCheckbox: I confirm and accept full responsibility for the correct storage and shipment of this medicine.

impact.profileSubtitle: Medicines you helped redirect from disposal through your delivered orders
impact.adminSubtitle: Total across all delivered orders on MedMarket
impact.disclaimer: Estimates based on 50 g average unit weight and 6 kg CO₂e per kg of pharmaceutical waste prevented from incineration.
